title: SnowyWorld
description: SnowyWorld completely transforms the Overworld into a frozen, snow-covered landscape.❄️
body:
❄️ **SnowyWorld**– Eternal Winter in Minecraft! ❄️

Transform your Minecraft world into a frozen wasteland! The SnowyWorld datapack replaces all biomes with snowy and cold ones, turning your survival into a true winter challenge.

**Features**:

❄️Every biome is now snowy – no more green grass, only snow, ice, and winter forests!

❄️Cold everywhere – even deserts, jungles, and swamps are covered in snow.
